Package com.enovka.gemini4j.domain

Provides domain classes representing objects of the Gemini API.
Since:
0.0.1
Author:
Everson Novka <enovka@gmail.com>
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    AnswerStyle
    Represents the desired style for grounded answers generated by the Gemini API.
    AnswerStyle.AnswerStyleBuilder  
    AttributionSourceId
    Identifier for the source contributing to this attribution.
    AttributionSourceId.AttributionSourceIdBuilder  
    Blob
    Raw media bytes.
    Blob.BlobBuilder  
    BlockedReason
    Represents the reason why a piece of content was blocked by the Gemini API's content filtering system.
    BlockedReason.BlockedReasonBuilder  
    BlockReason
    Represents the reason why a user input or prompt was blocked by the Gemini API.
    BlockReason.BlockReasonBuilder  
    CachedContent
    Represents a cached content.
    CachedContent.CachedContentBuilder  
    Candidate
    A response candidate generated from the model.
    Candidate.CandidateBuilder  
    Chunk
    A Chunk is a subpart of a Document that is treated as an independent unit for the purposes of vector representation and storage.
    Chunk.ChunkBuilder  
    ChunkData
    Extracted data that represents the Chunk content.
    ChunkData.ChunkDataBuilder  
    CitationMetadata
    A collection of source attributions for a piece of content.
    CitationMetadata.CitationMetadataBuilder  
    CitationSource
    A citation to a source for a portion of a specific response.
    CitationSource.CitationSourceBuilder  
    Condition
    Filter condition applicable to a single key.
    Condition.ConditionBuilder  
    Content
    The base structured datatype containing multipart content of a message.
    Content.ContentBuilder  
    ContentEmbedding
    A list of floats representing an embedding.
    ContentEmbedding.ContentEmbeddingBuilder  
    ContentFilter
    Content filtering metadata associated with processing a single request.
    ContentFilter.ContentFilterBuilder  
    CustomMetadata
    User provided metadata stored as key-value pairs.
    CustomMetadata.CustomMetadataBuilder  
    EmbedContentResponse
    The response to an EmbedContentRequest.
    EmbedContentResponse.EmbedContentResponseBuilder  
    Embedding
    Represents an embedding generated by the Gemini API.
    Embedding.EmbeddingBuilder  
    ErrorResponse
    Represents an error response from the Gemini API.
    ErrorResponse.ErrorResponseBuilder  
    FileData
    URI based data.
    FileData.FileDataBuilder  
    FinishReason
    Represents the reason why the Gemini API model stopped generating tokens for a particular candidate response.
    FinishReason.FinishReasonBuilder  
    FunctionCall
    A predicted FunctionCall returned from the model that contains a string representing the FunctionDeclaration.name with the arguments and their values.
    FunctionCall.FunctionCallBuilder  
    FunctionCallingConfig
    Configuration for specifying function calling behavior.
    FunctionCallingConfig.FunctionCallingConfigBuilder  
    FunctionDeclaration
    Structured representation of a function declaration as defined by the OpenAPI 3.03 specification.
    FunctionDeclaration.FunctionDeclarationBuilder  
    GenerationConfig
    Configuration options for model generation and outputs.
    GenerationConfig.GenerationConfigBuilder  
    GroundingAttribution
    Attribution for a source that contributed to an answer.
    GroundingAttribution.GroundingAttributionBuilder  
    GroundingPassage
    Passage included inline with a grounding configuration.
    GroundingPassage.GroundingPassageBuilder  
    GroundingPassageId
    Identifier for a part within a GroundingPassage.
    GroundingPassageId.GroundingPassageIdBuilder  
    GroundingPassages
    A repeated list of passages.
    GroundingPassages.GroundingPassagesBuilder  
    HarmBlockThreshold
    Represents the threshold for blocking content based on the probability of harm, as assessed by the Gemini API's safety system.
    HarmBlockThreshold.HarmBlockThresholdBuilder  
    HarmCategory
    Represents a category of potential harm that the Gemini API can assess in generated content.
    HarmCategory.HarmCategoryBuilder  
    HarmProbability
    Represents the probability that a piece of content generated by the Gemini API is harmful according to the API's safety classification system.
    HarmProbability.HarmProbabilityBuilder  
    InputFeedback
    Feedback related to the input data used to answer the question, as opposed to model-generated response to the question.
    InputFeedback.InputFeedbackBuilder  
    ListModel
    Response from ListModel containing a paginated list of Models.
    ListModel.ListModelBuilder  
    Message
    A message within a conversation.
    Message.MessageBuilder  
    MessagePrompt
    The structured textual input given to the model as a prompt.
    MessagePrompt.MessagePromptBuilder  
    MetadataFilter
    User provided filter to limit retrieval based on Chunk or Document level metadata values.
    MetadataFilter.MetadataFilterBuilder  
    Mode
    Represents the execution mode for function calling in the Gemini API.
    Mode.ModeBuilder  
    Model
    Information about a Generative Language Model.
    Model.ModelBuilder  
    Operator
    Represents a comparison operator used in metadata filters for the Gemini API.
    Operator.OperatorBuilder  
    Part
    A datatype containing media that is part of a multipart Content message.
    Part.PartBuilder  
    Permission
    Represents a permission.
    Permission.PermissionBuilder  
    PermissionState
    Represents the state of a permission within the Gemini API.
    PermissionState.PermissionStateBuilder  
    PromptFeedback
    A set of the feedback metadata the prompt specified in GenerateContentRequest.content.
    PromptFeedback.PromptFeedbackBuilder  
    RelevantChunk
    The information for a chunk relevant to a query.
    RelevantChunk.RelevantChunkBuilder  
    SafetyRating
    Safety rating for a piece of content.
    SafetyRating.SafetyRatingBuilder  
    SafetySetting
    Safety setting, affecting the safety-blocking behavior.
    SafetySetting.SafetySettingBuilder  
    Schema
    The Schema object allows the definition of input and output data types.
    Schema.SchemaBuilder  
    SemanticRetrieverChunk
    Identifier for a Chunk retrieved via Semantic Retriever specified in the GenerateAnswerRequest using SemanticRetrieverConfig.
    SemanticRetrieverChunk.SemanticRetrieverChunkBuilder  
    SemanticRetrieverConfig
    Configuration for retrieving grounding content from a Corpus or Document created using the Semantic Retriever API.
    SemanticRetrieverConfig.SemanticRetrieverConfigBuilder  
    State
    Represents the current processing state of a Chunk in the Gemini API.
    State.StateBuilder  
    StringList
    User provided string values assigned to a single metadata key.
    StringList.StringListBuilder  
    TaskType
    Represents the type of task for which the embedding will be used.
    TaskType.TaskTypeBuilder  
    TextPrompt
    The free-form input text given to the model as a prompt.
    TextPrompt.TextPromptBuilder  
    Tool
    Tool details that the model may use to generate response.
    Tool.ToolBuilder  
    ToolConfig
    The Tool configuration containing parameters for specifying Tool use in the request.
    ToolConfig.ToolConfigBuilder  
    Type
    Represents an OpenAPI data type used for defining parameters and schemas in the Gemini API.
    Type.TypeBuilder  
    UsageMetadata
    Metadata on the usage of the cached content.
    UsageMetadata.UsageMetadataBuilder  
    User
    The user that sent this message.
    User.UserBuilder
